form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (17.26) at Wanganui Straight in a Class 4. Lines up from box 1 for the first time. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (17.26) at Wanganui Straight in a Class 4. Lines up from box 1 for the first time. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.99) when sixth over 457m at Manawatu in a Class 4. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and six places from 16 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 3rd over 457m at Manawatu beaten 5 lengths (25.86) behind My Mini Me in a Class 5 on February 27. Gets chance to atone.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.68) at Ascot Park in a Class 5, finishing sixth and beaten 10 lengths. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame at his last four runs, the latest finishing third at big odds in 30.56 at Addington. Not to be underestimated.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Addington over 525m. Last start finished 4th on April 2 over 525m at Addington behind Opawa Hass beaten 6 lengths (30.57) in a Class 5. Boasts a course and distance PB in a scintillating 29.7. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down rounding bend and interference exiting bend.

form.formComment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Other runners look much more appealing.
